content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.65%, Bank Nifty -0.90%, India VIX +6% to 18.49 — risk-off undertone with selective sectoral strength (IT, pharma, FMCG defensive bid). Crude at $120+ creates a bifurcated market: upstream/refiners benefit, broad market under pressure. With 8 holdings already on the book all opened today and a poor 5-day record (13% win rate, profit factor 0.5x), priority is risk management on existing book rather than fresh entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.6% unrealized; FY26 results strong (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%). Trail SL from 1025 to 1028 — still ~1% below CMP 1041.80, locks in ~4.5% gain while leaving room. Target 1110 retained — near 52w high 1141, supported by sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Recovered to -1.4% from earlier lows; CMP 123.43 vs entry 125.10. Gold macro intact (USD/INR weak, geopolitical risk, Fed dovish path). SL at 119 (~3.5% below CMP) appropriate; defensive ballast position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1780.00,
      "new_target": 1845.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.0% unrealized at 1806; near 52w high 1851. Q4 results May 21 — binary catalyst flag, but >3 sessions away. Trail SL from 1772 to 1780 (~1.5% below CMP) to lock in ~2.6% gain. Tighten target to 1845 (just below 52w high) given resistance proximity. Will reassess closer to earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6% unrealized. CMP 481.65, hit 52w high 491.25 earlier today but faded. Production/dispatch declines YoY are red flags. Keep SL at 478 (still above entry breakeven) — tightening further with CMP at 481 would breach the 0.5% trail-gap rule. Trim target to 495 given today's failure to hold above 491."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 196.00,
      "new_target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY blowout; broke out to fresh 52w high 201.48 today on +12.15% move. CMP 200.36, now profitable. Raise SL from 195 to 196 (still ~2% below CMP), locking in near-breakeven minimum. Target 215 retained (~7% upside) on momentum continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% unrealized. CMP 297.75, SL at 296 (just 0.6% below CMP — already very tight). Brent at $120 fundamental support, but APPCB stop-production order on Mori well + windfall-tax tail risk weighs. SL is already protective; do not loosen. Will stop out cleanly if it breaks 296."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% unrealized at 23.93. SL 22.85 = ~4.5% below CMP, target 24.95 = ~4.3% upside. Sun Pharma (23.8% weight) running, Organon deal catalyst. Position sized small; let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%. Q4 PAT +22%, AUM Rs 5L cr, dividend Rs 6 — strong fundamentals, faded intraday from 975 high to 945. SL 915 (~3.2% below CMP) appropriate; target 985 (~4.4% upside). No reason to modify a fresh position that hasn't moved."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 30x @ 1542 placed 506m ago. CMP 1572 — ran away from limit. Per ORDER HYGIENE, will not stack a second order. The setup remains intact (52w high break, shipping macro tailwind) but I will NOT cancel — let the limit stay; stock often retests breakout levels. If unfilled by EOD it expires harmlessly."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT missed consensus by ~10%; sector beta negative (Nifty IT -25% YTD); MACD bearish crossover on indicators. One-day +5% pop in a sector facing FPI outflows is not a clean swing setup. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.55% YoY is a clear earnings disappointment. Jio IPO is forward catalyst but timing uncertain. Already have ONGC for upstream oil exposure; adding another energy name would cluster-stack. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 5 — within 3 trading sessions. Per binary-event rule, do NOT open new CNC into earnings. Setup is interesting (FMCG defensive, brokerage TPs Rs 340-408) but timing is wrong. Revisit post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Stunning Q4 (PAT +203% YoY, GRM $13.75) but stock already +56% off recent base and faded from 1159 high to 1118 today — sell-the-news risk. Refining cyclicality + windfall-tax risk if oil stays >$100. Already have ONGC energy exposure; ENERGY-cluster discipline applies. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARTIARTL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results JUST OUT April 29 — overnight reaction risk on the print. Decent technical breakout but I'd rather let the post-results dust settle. Pass for today."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "reasoning": "+14.48% one-day pop but fundamentals BEARISH per research: FY26 revenue +3% only, Q4 PAT -3% YoY, CEO transition mid-year, stock -42% over 12 months. This is a short-cover / bear-trap pop, not a clean trend setup. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 6 — binary catalyst within 3-4 trading sessions, plus auto sector down 1.08%. No new entry per binary-event discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RBLBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Already hold BANDHANBNK in mid-tier private bank space and book is heavy on financials (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + BAJFINANCE). Cluster-discipline rule applies — do not stack a fourth financial."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge interesting but no clear catalyst surfaced in research; metals sector -1.88%. Pass without conviction."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1025 to 1028 to lock in ~4.5% gain; respects 0.5% gap below CMP 1041.80."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 119 (~3.5% below CMP) appropriate; gold macro thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1780.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1772 to 1780 — lock in ~2.6% gain; near 52w high resistance, Q4 results May 21 binary risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 already 0.7% below CMP — at the edge of trail-gap rule. Failed to hold 491 high. Do not tighten further; let it work or stop cleanly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 196.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout +68% PAT, fresh 52w high. Raise SL to 196 (~2% below CMP), maintain target 215."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 already very tight (0.6% below CMP); cannot tighten further. Brent macro vs windfall-tax/operational red flags balance out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small position, +1.1%, structure intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat day-1 position; Q4 strong; let SL 915 / target 985 work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ITC and BAJAJ-AUTO have results within 3 sessions — revisit post-results. BHARTIARTL post-result reaction interesting if it holds 1880. CHENNPETRO and GESHIP are second-derivative oil/shipping plays — keep watching but cluster discipline limits energy exposure.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully constructed (8 holdings, 41% deployed) and now in management mode. 5-day stats are concerning (13% win rate, profit factor 0.5x) — discipline today is to TRAIL winners (PNBHOUSING, SUNPHARMA, BANDHANBNK), respect already-tight SLs on losers (ONGC, COALINDIA), and NOT add new exposure into a -0.65% Nifty / +6% VIX session. Financial-cluster exposure (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + BAJFINANCE) is at the cluster watch-line; no new financials today. SUNPHARMA Q4 is May 21 — outside 3-session binary window for now but will plan exit/trim by mid-May."
}
